title: manulea psilostoma
intro: Manulea psilostoma, also known as the psilostoma flower or mountain rose, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Manulea psilostoma include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in some cultures for its ornamental and fragrant flowers.
